irregularities.label: METADATA_ROWS
irregularities.evidence: Rows 0-1 contain table title and number, not data

irregularities.label: MULTI_LEVEL_HEADER
irregularities.evidence: Rows 2-4 have a multi-level header with categories in row 2 and sub-labels in rows 3-4. Row 4 contains merged headers across multiple columns.
irregularities.details: Level 1 = marital status categories, Level 2 = year and gender statistics.

irregularities.label: INLINE_BILINGUAL
irregularities.evidence: Header cells, such as [2]="婚姻狀況\nMarital status", contain both Chinese and English separated by a newline.
irregularities.details: This pattern appears in several header cells.

irregularities.label: WIDE_FORMAT
irregularities.evidence: Columns 4, 6, 8, 10, 12, 14 have pairs for genders and totals, which are structured across years.
irregularities.details: Data structure includes multiple years as columns with dimensions that need to be reshaped.

irregularities.label: BILINGUAL_ALTERNATING_ROWS
irregularities.evidence: Rows 7 and 8 alternate between Chinese "亞洲人（非華人）" with numeric data and English "Asian (other than Chinese)" with no numeric values.
irregularities.details: Pattern repeats for all ethnicities, where every Chinese row has numeric data and the subsequent English row does not.

irregularities.label: IMPLICIT_AGGREGATION_ROWS
irregularities.evidence: Row 41 "所有少數族裔人士" represents a total of the ethnicities above.
irregularities.details: This row summarizes the data from rows above into a coarser aggregation.

irregularities.label: SPARSE_ROW_FILL
irregularities.evidence: The year in column 0 is written only on certain rows (every set of entries) while other rows remain blank, indicating a need to forward-fill.
irregularities.details: Years only appear at the start of blocks of data; blank cells require filling for continuity.
